bracu_official.summary: A session titled 'Classroom to Career' was organized to help students with goal setting for academic and professional success.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University conducts synergy in action workshop to strengthen workplace effectiveness
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a workshop to enhance workplace effectiveness through synergy in action.
